attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	
COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY,
INV_ORG_MFG_TYPE,
SK_PRJCT_ORG_ID_INT,
CREATE_DTM,
DV_CREATE_DT,
LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
DV_LAST_UPDATE_DT,
ORG_TYPE_CD,
CREATED_BY_AUTO_TEST_FLG,
UPDATED_BY_AUTO_TEST_FLG,
BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,
SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
CREATED_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
LAST_UPD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
RU_INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,
EDW_CREATE_DTM,
EDW_CREATE_USER,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
EDW_UPDATE_USER,
START_TV_DT,
END_TV_DT,
RU_MFTRNG_OEM_SUP_PTY_KEY ,
RU_BK_MFTRNG_LOC_NAME 
FROM $$WORKDB.W_COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT WCPOAT  
WHERE DML_TYPE='I'
AND NOT EXISTS 
				(SELECT 1 
					FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_TV NCPOAT
					WHERE WCPOAT.COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY = NCPOAT.COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY
					AND WCPOAT.START_TV_DT = NCPOAT.START_TV_DT
				)

SELECT 
COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY,
INV_ORG_MFG_TYPE,
SK_PRJCT_ORG_ID_INT,
CREATE_DTM,
DV_CREATE_DT,
LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
DV_LAST_UPDATE_DT,
ORG_TYPE_CD,
CREATED_BY_AUTO_TEST_FLG,
UPDATED_BY_AUTO_TEST_FLG,
BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,
SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
CREATED_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
LAST_UPD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
RU_INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,
EDW_CREATE_DTM,
EDW_CREATE_USER,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
EDW_UPDATE_USER,
RU_MFTRNG_OEM_SUP_PTY_KEY ,
RU_BK_MFTRNG_LOC_NAME 
FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_TV NCPOAT  
WHERE  END_TV_DT = '3500-01-01'
